choices: Your 16 year old best friend Will
1.content:
Your alarm goes off, waking you up in your bed.

You turn the alarm off before yawning loudly and stretching your arms above your head sleepily. Annoyingly your hands bang into the headboard behind your bed causing your fingers to collapse into themselves, leaving your hands with large flat stumps on the end of them.

You sigh in resignation as you bring your hands down and attempt to reshape your fingers just with your palms. It takes you quite a bit of time to get them back to normal which means you're late getting up.

You dash out of bed to your ensuite bathroom so that you can start getting ready for school.

You start off by brushing your teeth with the new ultra-soft toothbrush your mother bought you so that you didn't accidentally smoosh your teeth, before jumping in the shower. You had the shower set to the perfect temperature; not too cold that you came out shivering, but not too hot that you started to melt.

Shower done, you head back to your room to get dressed, picking out a plain black t-shirt and some blue jeans to go with your white converse.

You can hear your mother moving around downstairs making breakfast so you quickly grab your backpack and rush out of your room.

As you open the door into the hallway you run into someone. Who is it?
1.title: A day in the life of a Play-Doh boy

choices: your brother now has the "upper hand" and blackmails you
he didn't mean to do it and gives it straight back
you don't need your right hand, you're ambidextrous
you need to grab him before he runs off and does something nasty with it
your mother is heading up the stairs towards you both
11.content:
As you walk out the door to your bedroom you literally run into your little brother Sammy, knocking him backwards. He ends up falling to the floor, too surprised to try and cushion his fall.

"Ow! What the hell Jamie? Why don't you watch where you're going?"

"Sorry Sammy, I'm late for school so I was in too much of a rush."

You feel guilty for smacking into him so you walk towards him before bending and offering your hand to help pull him up off the floor. Sammy grabs your wrist and squeezes, flattening it to about 1/2 an ich wide, before wrenching it towards him.

There's a weird ripping/squelching sound as your now flattened wrist tears from one edge to the other, leaving your brother with your detached hand still clutched in his.

This caught you by surprise but you quickly realise...
11.title: Your 13 year old brother Sam

info.brief_description: A teen with a bizarre body condition makes his way through life as best he can.
info.description:
You are 16 year-old Jamie Connors.

Weirdly, you were born with a body made of Play-Doh which means your body can be reshaped, moulded, melted or torn apart in any number of ways without you being physically hurt (although you cannot replace a part of you that is lost).

This means you are basically immortal. Unfortunately, it also means that people tend to take advantage of this fact, using and abusing you in any number of ways.



RULES


No one sentence chapters please unless it adds to the narrative or bridges the chapters.

Paragraph minimum chapters appreciated but not required (see above).

Sex is fine (gay/straight/other), but no animals please.

Jamie literally cannot die, he can only be incapacitated or reduced to almost nothing.

Any parts removed from Jamie can still be felt and moved by him.

Use proper spelling and punctuation.

Literally anything else goes!
